# Creative Genome Schema

Build a database of 100–300 niche videos. The goal is not to copy winners. The goal is to identify repeatable mechanisms.

## Columns

```text
Platform
Creator
Follower/subscriber count
Video URL
Date posted
Views
Likes
Comments
Shares/sends
Saves
Follower/subscriber gain
Length
Topic
Audience
Hook type
First-frame type
Face present?
Object/screen/hands present?
Emotion shown
On-screen headline?
Caption/subtitles?
Text type
Text position
Text density
Text timing
CTA type
Audio type
Trend/sound used?
Story format
Time-to-first-payoff
Number of visual resets
Proof shown?
Originality level
Search keyword/topic
Hashtags
Cover/title style
Top comment theme
Likely reason it won
Likely reason it failed
Next variant to test
```

## Tag libraries

### Hook type

```text
result-first
problem-first
contrarian
curiosity-gap
mistake
proof-first
identity-callout
myth-bust
challenge
before-after
search-direct
```

### First-frame type

```text
face
emotion
screen-recording
before-after
result
mistake
data
object-closeup
motion
text-only
```

### Text type

```text
caption
headline
label
annotation
proof
navigation
CTA
keyword
```

### Story type

```text
problem-test-result
before-after-why
myth-evidence-correction
teardown
list
challenge
case-study
tutorial
rant
reaction
```

### Value type

```text
saveable
sendable
commentable
rewatchable
searchable
follow-worthy
```

## Mechanism notes

For each winning video, classify why it likely won:

```text
first frame clarity
hook tension
emotional activation
visual proof
search demand
saveable framework
sendable identity
series memory
creator authority
trend/culture timing
```
